institution.address: 560 Ponce de Leon Ave.  Cr. Arroyo St.

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at EDP University of Puerto Rico Inc-San Juan rose 128% between 2021 and 2024 ($6.2k → $14.1k).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at EDP University of Puerto Rico Inc-San Juan rose 33% between 2017 and 2020 ($10.5k → $14.0k).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at EDP University of Puerto Rico Inc-San Juan fell 14% between 2021 and 2024 (70.0% → 60.0%).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at EDP University of Puerto Rico Inc-San Juan rose 14% between 2021 and 2024 ($6.2k → $7.0k).
